info.name: Maham Expo - Admin
info.description:
Admin role endpoints for Maham Expo API.
Full CRUD access to all resources.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Tech Expo 2025",
    "name_ar": "معرض التقنية 2025",
    "description": "Annual technology exhibition",
    "description_ar": "المعرض التقني السنوي",
    "category_id": "{{category_id}}",
    "city_id": "{{city_id}}",
    "address": "Riyadh Exhibition Center",
    "latitude": 24.7136,
    "longitude": 46.6753,
    "start_date": "2025-03-01",
    "end_date": "2025-03-05",
    "opening_time": "09:00",
    "closing_time": "21:00",
    "features": [
        "wifi",
        "parking",
        "food_court"
    ],
    "features_ar": [
        "واي فاي",
        "موقف سيارات",
        "منطقة طعام"
    ],
    "organizer_name": "Maham Events",
    "organizer_phone": "+966500000000",
    "organizer_email": "events@maham.com",
    "status": "draft",
    "is_featured": true
}

{
    "name": "Hall A",
    "name_ar": "القاعة أ",
    "description": "Main exhibition hall",
    "description_ar": "قاعة العرض الرئيسية",
    "icon": "building",
    "is_active": true,
    "sort_order": 1
}

{
    "name": "Gold Package",
    "name_ar": "الباقة الذهبية",
    "description": "Premium sponsorship with maximum exposure",
    "description_ar": "رعاية متميزة مع أقصى تعرض",
    "tier": "gold",
    "price": 50000,
    "max_sponsors": 3,
    "benefits": [
        "logo on main stage",
        "VIP area access"
    ],
    "display_screens_count": 5,
    "banners_count": 10,
    "vip_invitations_count": 20,
    "booth_area_sqm": 100,
    "logo_placement": [
        "website",
        "brochure",
        "entrance"
    ],
    "is_active": true,
    "sort_order": 2
}

{
    "title": "Welcome Banner",
    "title_ar": "بانر ترحيبي",
    "description": "Main homepage banner",
    "description_ar": "البانر الرئيسي للصفحة",
    "image": "https://example.com/banner.jpg",
    "link_url": "https://example.com",
    "position": "home_hero",
    "is_active": true,
    "sort_order": 1,
    "start_date": "2025-01-01",
    "end_date": "2025-12-31"
}

{ "slug": "about-us", "title": "About Us", "title_ar": "من نحن", "content": "

About Us

Welcome to Maham Expo

", "content_ar": "

من نحن

مرحباً بكم في معرض محام

", "type": "static", "is_active": true, "sort_order": 1 }

{
    "question": "How to book a space?",
    "question_ar": "كيف أحجز مساحة؟",
    "answer": "Browse events, select a space, and submit a rental request.",
    "answer_ar": "تصفح المعارض، اختر مساحة، وقدم طلب إيجار.",
    "category": "booking",
    "is_active": true,
    "sort_order": 1
}

{
    "user_id": "{{merchant_user_id}}",
    "invoiceable_type": "rental_contract",
    "invoiceable_id": "{{rental_contract_id}}",
    "title": "Space Rental Invoice",
    "title_ar": "فاتورة إيجار مساحة",
    "subtotal": 5000,
    "tax_amount": 750,
    "total_amount": 5750,
    "issue_date": "2025-03-01",
    "due_date": "2025-03-15",
    "items": [
        {
            "description": "Booth B1 rental",
            "quantity": 1,
            "unit_price": 5000,
            "total": 5000
        }
    ],
    "notes": "Payment due within 15 days"
}

{
    "event_id": "{{event_id}}",
    "name": "Tech Corp",
    "name_ar": "شركة التقنية",

    "company_name_ar": "شركة التقنية المحدودة",
    "description": "Leading technology company",
    "contact_person": "John Smith",
    "contact_email": "john@techcorp.com",
    "contact_phone": "+966500000050",
    "website": "https://techcorp.com",
    "status": "active"
}

{
    "sponsor_id": "{{sponsor_id}}",

}
